title: Agentic AI Engineer (Remote, 6-Month Contract)
company_focus: Enterprise information services and data analytics solutions
description:
Agentic AI Engineer Enterprise Integrations, Intelligent
Automation & AI Platform Delivery Department: IT & Digital
Transformation Reports to: Sr. Director, Infrastructure & BI
Type: 6 month contract Location: Remote - US The Opportunity
Accuris Technologies is executing a company-wide AI
transformation across 40+ initiatives spanning Finance,
Sales, Marketing, Legal, RevOps, Product, HR, and Customer
Experience. We have a funded roadmap, active enterprise AI
licenses, and governed integrations already live across our
core systems. We are looking for an Agentic AI Engineer to
lead technical delivery-building connectors, agents, and
workflows that transform our CRM, ERP, HRIS, and data
platforms into a unified, natural-language-driven
experience. This role will bring our AI strategy to life
through real, production-grade systems. Core
Responsibilities

- Design and build agentic systems that orchestrate across
  ERP, CRM, data warehouse, HRIS, and BI platforms
- Develop multi-step AI workflows including tool selection,
  data retrieval, reasoning, and response generation
- Build and extend enterprise integrations, including
  authentication (OAuth, SSO) and RBAC enforcement
- Deliver AI-powered business solutions such as pricing
  engines, SDR automation, contract workflows, and executive
  dashboards
- Implement governance frameworks including audit logging,
  data lineage, and PII protection
- Partner with business teams to translate workflows into AI-
  enabled solutions
- Drive adoption through reusable prompts, tools, and training
  for non-technical users

What We're Looking For

- 3+ years building API integrations with CRM, ERP, or HRIS
  systems
- Strong Python experience with LLM APIs and SDKs
- Experience with agentic architectures (tool use, function
  calling, multi-step workflows)
- Familiarity with AI frameworks (LangChain, MCP, or similar)
- Experience with OAuth, SSO/SAML, and enterprise
  authentication
- Background in data platforms, BI tools, and enterprise data
  governance (RBAC, row-level security)

What Sets You Apart

- Experience building production AI systems connected to live
  enterprise data
- Strong systems thinking across integrations, permissions,
  and reliability
- Track record of delivering AI tools adopted by business
  users
- Ability to translate business problems into multi-system AI
  workflows
- Experience in pricing, contract management, or revenue
  operations systems

How We Evaluate Candidates

- Agentic Architecture: designing autonomous, multi-system AI
  workflows
- Enterprise Integration: building and managing production
  integrations
- Business Delivery: shipping end-to-end solutions (pricing,
  SDR, CLM, etc.)
- Governance & Adoption: ensuring trust, usage, and measurable
  impact

Why Join Us This is not a research role-we have a live
platform, a funded roadmap, and strong executive alignment.
You'll play a key role in building an AI-native enterprise
by connecting systems, deploying agents, and driving real
adoption. Apply with your resume and a brief note on why
this role interests you. Optionally include links to
relevant systems or integrations you've built. },"hasVirtual

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building agentic AI systems,
multi-step AI workflows with tool selection and reasoning,
and developing AI-powered business solutions. The engineer
will work hands-on with LLM APIs, agentic architectures, and
AI frameworks like LangChain to create production-grade AI
systems.
